velocity_posts.text:
Throwback to when my outfit reviews were stronger than my performance reviews. 
#TBT #SchoolDays 👨🏽‍🏫

Dalí's post-war imagination absorbed nuclear-age headlines. His Three Sphinxes of Bikini (1947, oil on canvas) surrealistically integrates the "Bikini" name into enigmatic sphinx-like forms with mushroom clouds.

I don't have the same love for the BBC as an institution as most other people on Bluesky have. Hell, I wrote about the bias in its news output for my A-Levels in 2003. 

However, two decades later, it's obvious that things are far worse and the rot is far more pervasive. A massive reset is required.

And don't tell me this is a typical lefty attack on free speech. Free speech absolutist Donald Trump threatened to ban tiktok last year. 

This is about democracy and security, both of which we will lose if we don't do something.

It's time for an ultimatum. Be legal. Or be banned.

Heute steht unter dem Motto "Papierkram wälzen & vorbereiten".

1. To-Do erledigt.

Next: Anruf bei Agentur für Arbeit als Reaktion auf deren.. suboptimalen Antwortbrief, d. eher nicht auf meine Terminanfrage eingeht.

Prokrastiniere auch nur seit 20 Minuten & versuche Panikattacke zu unterdrücken

Guns are so 20th century.

Today's warfare is sophisticated attacks on our defence and other vital infrastructure.

But a huge part of it is a propaganda war, designed to destabilise enemies with misinformation.

And it's working.

Because we're doing nothing to stop it.

We really need to have a talk about the BBC.

Mostly about who goes on trial in public and who gets the deprogramming treatment, while every brick is removed from site.
